channel.title: Databases on OranLooney.com
channel.description: Recent content in Databases on OranLooney.com

item.title: The Considerate Data Modeler
item.description: What’s your hot take on relational databases? Here’s mine: Data modeling is closer to library science than computer science. No one is impressed by a librarian who gets creative and files cookbooks under “G” for “Gourmand.” The best catalog system is where everything is in an obvious place, where everything conforms to expectations. The best librarian is considerate of the patrons. The best library is calm, safe, and boring. And the best database is exactly the same.
